headline: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
summary: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees said withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.

headline: Russian strikes kill 10 as Zelensky says Ukraine hits oil tankers and terminal
summary: Fatalities have been reported around Ukraine as Kyiv says Russian 'shadow fleet' tankers were hit by drones.

headline: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
summary: Sahand tells the BBC World Service he sends satellite internet terminals into Iran to help show 'the real picture'.

headline: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
summary: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.

headline: Two US service members reported missing in Morocco
summary: A search and rescue operation is underway for the service members, the US African Command said.

headline: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating
summary: Narges Mohammadi's family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration.

headline: US to reduce troops in Germany 'a lot further' than withdrawal of 5,000
summary: Trump says US will reduce number of troops in Germany beyond the announced withdrawal of 5,000.

headline: Shakira thrills crowd of 2 million with free concert on Brazil's Copacabana beach
summary: Shakira performed a massive free concert drawing an estimated 2 million people to Rio de Janeiro's famous beach.

headline: Israeli airstrikes kill 7 in southern Lebanon as a Catholic convent is bulldozed
summary: Airstrikes in southern Lebanon killed 7 people amid ongoing tensions, with a Catholic convent also bulldozed.

headline: UAE aviation authority says air traffic has returned to normal
summary: Air traffic in the UAE has returned to normal after precautionary measures implemented at the start of the Iran war were lifted.

headline: US troop drawdown underlines European defence responsibility, says German minister
summary: The Pentagon announced withdrawal of 5,000 troops as a rift over the Iran war and tariff tensions strained US-Europe relations.
